title: Leuconymphaea goudotiana
taxonomy: Leuconymphaea goudotiana is a species of freshwater sponges in the class Sclerospongiae and the phylum Porifera. It belongs to the family Spongillidae. Leuconymphaea goudotiana is a freshwater sponge species endemic to Indonesia. The classification of Leuconymphaea goudotiana includes its kingdom as Animalia. As a member of the phylum Porifera, it is a multicellular, sessile, and filter-feeding organism.
